files.contents: {"name":"express-tailwind-color-app","version":"0.1.0","private":true,"description":"Express + Tailwind CSS Hello World app with color control UI","scripts":{"build:css":"tailwindcss -i ./src/styles/input.css -o ./public/styles.css","watch:css":"tailwindcss -i ./src/styles/input.css -o ./public/styles.css --watch","build":"tsc && npm run build:css","dev":"npm run build:css && ts-node src/server.ts","test":"mocha -r ts-node/register tests/**/*.test.ts","prestart":"npm run build","start":"node dist/server.js"},"dependencies":{"express":"^4.19.2"},"devDependencies":{"@types/chai":"^4.3.11","@types/express":"^4.17.21","@types/mocha":"^10.0.6","@types/node":"^20.12.7","@types/supertest":"^2.0.16","autoprefixer":"^10.4.19","chai":"^4.4.1","mocha":"^10.4.0","postcss":"^8.4.38","supertest":"^6.3.4","tailwindcss":"^3.4.9","ts-node":"^10.9.2","typescript":"^5.4.5"}}

Hello World

Served by Express from /public

Express + Tailwind Hello World

Overview
- Express server serves static files from /public
- Tailwind CSS compiled to /public/styles.css
- Root path (GET /) responds with index.html

Getting Started
1) Install dependencies
   npm install

2) Start the app (builds TS and CSS automatically)
   npm start
   Server will be available at http://localhost:3000

Development
- Build once and run with ts-node
  npm run dev
- Watch and rebuild CSS during development
  npm run watch:css

Testing
- Run tests
  npm test

Build outputs
- TypeScript -> dist/
- Tailwind CSS -> public/styles.css

notes: npm start runs a prestart build (TypeScript + Tailwind) and then launches node dist/server.js
Tests use supertest against the exported Express app; no server port binding is required during tests
